Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: setting up a DECLARE model dictionary with all 18 constraint types mapping out a process flow from IG through DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP to FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For the constraints Ill define existence rules for IG DD AG and FL leave absence empty and set exactly one constraints for IG and F

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now Im filling in the remaining constraint types responded existence between DD and TFC and PC and LT coexistence for LT with UT and AG with MP response rules linking IG to DD AG to MP and MP to FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: precedence constraints showing DD before IG PC before DD and FL before AG

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: succession patterns for IGDD DDTFC and AGFL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For the chain variants Im adding chainresponse from TFC to CE and LT to UT chainprecedence from PC to CE and chainsuccession from IG to DD

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill leave noncoexistence empty since theres no clear conflict then define nonsuccession to prevent FL from leading back to IG and MP from being followed by DD plus nonchainsuccession to block PC from directly preceding FL

Name: Validation - NE
Text: The format uses tuples with support and confidence values for each constraint So Ill represent the constraint values as tuples with support and confidence then write out the code to handle this structure
